reasoning: The informal statement is the classical theorem (Munkres 32.3) that every locally compact Hausdorff space is regular — true and unambiguous. The only differences are cosmetic: `open Topology` vs `open scoped Topology` (both make scoped notations available; neither is used in this particular statement), and the presence of `noncomputable section` (irrelevant for a Prop).
